mapper.sql: id, post_id, parent_id, root_id, user_id, author_name, author_avatar, reply_to_uid, reply_to_name, content, status, like_count, reply_count, ip_address, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_delelte
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, parent_id, root_id, user_id, author_name, author_avatar, reply_to_uid, reply_to_name, content, status, like_count, ip_address, created_at, updated_at, is_delelte) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, #{userId}, #{authorName}, #{authorAvatar}, #{replyToUid}, #{replyToName}, #{content}, #{status}, 0, #{ipAddress}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (status = 1 OR user_id = #{currentUserId})

SELECT FROM comments WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (status = 1 OR user_id = #{currentUserId}) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (status = 1 OR user_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT FROM comments WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0
SELECT FROM comments WHERE is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = NOW(), is_delelte = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
